016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.internal;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
020
021import java.util.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
026
027/**
028 * Represents a wrapped {@link Map} where entries in the map can be removed without affecting the underlying map.
029 *
030 *
031 * @param <T> The class type of the wrapped bean.
032 * @serial exclude
033 */
034@SuppressWarnings({
035   "rawtypes",  // Raw types necessary for generic Map delegation
036   "java:S110"  // Inheritance depth inherited from JsonMap -> MarshalledMap -> LinkedHashMap chain; intentional
037})
038public class DelegateMap<T extends Map> extends JsonMap implements Delegate<T> {
039   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
040
041   private transient ClassMeta<T> classMeta;
042
043   /**
044    * Constructor.
045    *
046    * @param m The metadata object that created this delegate object.
047    * @param session The current bean session.
048    */
049   @SuppressWarnings({
050      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for Map operations
051   })
052   public DelegateMap(T m, MarshallingSession session) {
053      this.classMeta = session.getClassMetaForObject(m);
054      m.forEach((k, v) -> put(s(k), v));
055   }
056
057   /**
058    * Remove all but the specified keys from this map.
059    *
060    * <p>
061    * This does not affect the underlying map.
062    *
063    * @param keys The remaining keys in the map (in the specified order).
064    * @return This object.
065    */
066   public DelegateMap<T> filterKeys(List<String> keys) {
067      var m = new JsonMap();
068      keys.forEach(k -> {
069         if (containsKey(k))
070            m.put(k, get(k));
071      });
072      this.clear();
073      this.putAll(m);
074      return this;
075   }
076
077   @Override
078   public boolean equals(Object o) {
079      return o instanceof Map<?,?> o2 && eq(this, o2, (x, y) -> x.entrySet().equals(y.entrySet()));
080   }
081
082   @Override
083   public int hashCode() {
084      return entrySet().hashCode();
085   }
086
087   @Override /* Overridden from Delegate */
088   public ClassMeta<T> getBeanInfo() { return classMeta; }
089}
